title: Analyst - Assistant Relationship Manager (Job ID:10074912)
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Support the relationship managers in the delivery of relevant banking services to customers, in own coverage area to meet the BU's revenue targets.

  • Build and maintain effective relationships with customers and understand their needs in order to provide a high quality of service, under the guidance of more experienced members of the team.

  • Develop and maintain strong stakeholder management with key stakeholders both within MUFG and externally

  • To manage day-to-day business transactions with assigned customers

  • To handle customer onboarding services and updating customer account documentation

  • Focus on daily transaction processing/execution, facilitating enquiries and serving clients’ request and ensure the work process accuracy, smoothly and speedily

  • Work in partnership with Operations to ensure smooth processing of transactions.

  • Visit customers when required to maintain the customer’s relationship

  • Support departmental initiatives to deliver increase revenue opportunities and deliver a high quality of service to customers.

  • Provide transaction and monitoring support in connection with the delivery of MUFG products to meet the needs of the Bank’s customers.

  • To meet the organization’s expectations for productivity, quality and goal accomplishment

  • Always comply with internal rules and guidelines as well as with external laws and regulations pertaining to proper conduct of banking business

  • Ensure compliance with relevant regulations and limits.

  • To improve workflow efficiency

  • To advise on investment products concerning OTC derivatives contracts (includes FX Forwards) under Financial Advisers Act (FAA) and To Deal in investment products concerning OTC derivatives contracts (includes FX Forwards) under Securities and Futures Act (SFA)

  • To advise others on investment products concerning structured deposits (includes Embedded Deposits) under Financial Advisers Act (FAA)

  • To handle Embedded loans

Job Requirements:

  • Degree qualified

  • No experience required

  • Excellent interpersonal skills in order to deal effectively and courteously with others.

  • Good stakeholder management skills to collaborate with other departments.

  • Good team-player, ability to adapt to change needs of the organization and demands of internal and external stakeholders

  • Detailed understanding of MUFG’s product and services

  • Understanding of local laws and regulations

  • Well organized and efficient time management

  • Proficiency in Mircrosoft Office

postedCompany.description:
MUFG Bank, Ltd. is Japan’s premier bank, with a global network spanning in more than 40 markets. Outside of Japan, the bank offers an extensive scope of commercial and investment banking products and services to businesses, governments and individuals worldwide. MUFG Bank’s parent, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc. (MUFG) is one of the world’s leading financial groups. Headquartered in Tokyo and with over 360 years of history, the Group has about 120,000 employees and offers services including commercial banking, trust banking, securities, credit cards, consumer finance, asset management, and leasing.


The Group aims to be the world’s most trusted financial group through close collaboration among our operating companies and flexibly respond to all of the financial needs of our customers, serving society, and fostering shared and sustainable growth for a better world. MUFG’s shares trade on the Tokyo, Nagoya, and New York stock exchanges.


For more information, visit https://www.mufg.jp/english
postedCompany.name: MUFG BANK, LTD. Singapore Branch

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
